title: `read_verilog`: `inout` parameters not copied out of tasks
body:
This issue is related to #5151

### Version

Yosys 0.53+70 (git sha1 3ef4c91c3, g++ 12.2.0-14+deb12u1 -fPIC -O3)
And the #5154 PR 

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

```sv
module stmt_if_task (
    output logic [7:0] out_val_m6,
    input logic [7:0] in_val_m6,
    input bit condition_m6
);
    logic [7:0] var_m6;
    task automatic update_conditional_m6(input bit cond, inout logic [7:0] val);
        if (cond) begin
            val++;
        end else begin
            --val;
        end
    endtask
    always_comb begin
        var_m6 = in_val_m6;
        update_conditional_m6(condition_m6, var_m6);
        out_val_m6 = var_m6;
    end
endmodule
```

Simulate with these hexadecimal values as input
```txt
  in_val_m6 = 79 // or 121 in base10
  condition_m6 = 0
```


Synthesize with
```bash
yosys -p "read_verilog -sv stmt_if_task.sv ; proc; opt ; write_verilog -sv -noattr synth.sv"
```

### Expected Behavior

output of `out_val_m6` should be `120`

### Actual Behavior

output of `out_val_m6` is in fact `121`
code_blocks: yosys -p "read_verilog -sv stmt_if_task.sv ; proc; opt ; write_verilog -sv -noattr synth.sv"
